name: @microsoft/dynamics-365
description: Unified Microsoft Dynamics 365 connector for Dataverse, Sales, Customer Service, Field Service, Contact Center, Customer Insights, Finance, Supply Chain, Project Operations, Commerce, Human Resources, and Business Central. Tools use explicit subservice-prefixed IDs and resource-specific Microsoft auth inputs.
skills: work with Dynamics 365 Sales records and workflows
manage Customer Service cases, queues, notes, and attachments
inspect Field Service work orders, bookings, resources, and lifecycle state
read Contact Center conversations, transcripts, and representative availability
query Customer Insights tables, profiles, segments, and segment members
read Finance legal entities, ledgers, journals, customers, vendors, and invoices
read Supply Chain products, inventory, warehouses, orders, shipments, and receipts
manage Project Operations records, schedule APIs, and finance handoff checks
use Commerce Retail Server channels, catalogs, products, customers, carts, orders, and metadata
read Human Resources workers, jobs, leave, compensation, and benefit records
read Business Central companies, customers, vendors, invoices, items, accounts, journals, and attachments
